user.title: RMBT Speedtest
user.description: Enter the base URL of the RMBT control server. The default connects to the Austrian RTR Netztest service.

data_description.host: Base URL of the RMBT control server, e.g. https://c01.netztest.at (RTR Netztest Austria)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the RMBT control server. Check the URL and your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This control server is already configured.

data.duration: Test duration in seconds (0 = server default)
